title: ToolTreaux 5 Pocket Heavy Duty Leather Tool Pouch DIY Woodworking, 10.5 x 9.5
description:
Featuring heavy duty and durable leather, large backside tunnel loop, five front pockets for tool storage and reinforced rivets, this leather tool pouch is made to be used! This leather tool pouch or tool bag comes with two large front pockets, one fixed hammer hold, one small pocket and two pencil pockets. And, made from durable leather with reinforced corner stitching and rivets, this leather tool pouch is of high quality. While the tool pouch will be stiff upon arrival, it will soften and relax with time and use

ToolTreaux 5 Pocket Heavy Duty Leather Tool Pouch DIY Woodworking, 10.5 x 9.5

Featuring heavy duty and durable leather, large backside tunnel loop, five front pockets for tool storage and reinforced rivets, this leather tool pouch is made to be used!

Key Features

  • LEATHER TOOL POUCH: This leather tool pouch can handle any job! It features x5 front pockets and x1 hammer hold, making it a great add on to an existing tool belt for more storage or as a compact tool belt on its own (belt not included)
  • WIDE 3.5 INCH TUNNEL LOOP: The 3.5 inch wide leather tunnel loop on the backside of the tool belt makes it easy to slide on to an existing tool belt to give you more tool storage
  • QUALITY LEATHER TOOL BAG: Made from top quality leather with reinforced stitching and rivets, this leather tool pouch from ToolTreaux is made to be used; the tool belt will be stiff upon arrival but will soften and relax with use and time
  • WIDE APPLICATION: This heavy duty tool pouch from ToolTreaux is suitable for DIY at home, construction, electrical work, carpentry, woodworking, framing and building, for plumbers, contractors and more; great gifts for men, Dad gifts, husbands, brothers and boyfriends
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10.5 x 9.5 x 3.5 inches; Color: Brown; Material: Leather; Weight: 1.06lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 1LJIQZQ7
  • UPC: 810131704728
  • Color: Brown
  • Size: Adjustable

This leather tool pouch or tool bag comes with two large front pockets, one fixed hammer hold, one small pocket and two pencil pockets. And, made from durable leather with reinforced corner stitching and rivets, this leather tool pouch is of high quality. While the tool pouch will be stiff upon arrival, it will soften and relax with time and use.

This heavy duty tool pouch from ToolTreaux has a wide application range! It’s suitable for DIY at home, construction, electrical work, carpentry, woodworking, framing and building, for plumbers, contractors and more; it also makes great gifts for men, Dad gifts, husbands, brothers and boyfriends for birthdays, Christmas, Father's Day or just because!

With ample space for tools, including deep pockets for nail and screws, a tape measure, hammer loop and more, this large capacity tool pouch will give you more than sufficient access to and storage of tools, so you can focus on the job at hand.
